title: [VIRT] QEMU Integration: Teste da ISO com aceleração KVM

todos.description: Fix broken NC variable reference in run-qemu.sh: replace ${NC} with ${NO_COLOR} on line 14
Add test-iso-headless target to Makefile that sets HEADLESS=1 for CI headless QEMU execution
Create .golangci.yml configuration file for golangci-lint (Go 1.24+, timeout 5m, standard linters)
Add QEMU test-iso job in .github/workflows/build.yml that installs qemu-system-x86_64 + ovmf and runs make test-iso-headless
Document host dependencies (qemu-system-x86_64, ovmf) for QEMU/KVM testing in a docs/requirements.md file
